heroAlt: The Canadian National Vimy Memorial illuminated at night
heroEyebrow: Based in Arras, France — 45 minutes from Paris
heroTitle: Travel back in time and follow in the footsteps of heroes.
heroLede: Small-group, expert-guided tours of Canada's First World War battlefields — Vimy Ridge, Flanders Fields and the Somme. Walk the preserved trenches. Stand where they stood.

trustStrip.label: The historic heart of Canada's Western Front
Rated by veterans, historians & families alike
Expert guide, every step of the way

introHeading: Beyond the memorials, onto the ground where history happened.
introParagraphs: Based in Arras — the historic heart of Canada's war on the Western Front, and just 45 minutes from Paris by train — our tours bring history to life. Whether you are retracing a relative's footsteps, exploring Canada's military heritage, or fulfilling a lifelong pilgrimage to the battlefields, we take you beyond the memorials and onto the ground where history happened.
Catering to individuals, couples, and small groups, Heroes and Heritage Tours is your gateway to the First World War battlefields — guided by a historian who treats every visit as personal.
introImageAlt: The Last Post Ceremony beneath the Menin Gate Memorial in Ypres
familyTeaserAlt: A guest places a Canadian flag at her relative's grave in a Commonwealth war cemetery
familyTeaserParagraph: Send us your relative's name, and Joe will research their service record, the battles they fought in, and the exact ground they stood on — then build it into your tour. Families have found gravesites, uncovered medical histories, and walked the paths their great-grandfathers walked over a century ago.
familyTeaserQuote: He brought my Great Grandfather's war experience to life, and completed my own journey with an emotional trip to my Great Uncle's gravesite.
